description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a prominent front porch and dual staircases leading up to the main entrance. The exterior is clad in horizontal siding, painted a muted blue-gray, and features a dark gray, hip-style roof. The front façade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a covered balcony running the length of the upper floor, supported by white columns and railings. The rear of the house includes two back doors, small porches, and utility bins, while the sides have additional windows and secondary staircases. The house sits on a neatly trimmed green lawn, suggesting a suburban or neighborhood setting. Architectural details such as the wraparound porch, railings, and multiple entry points give the house a welcoming and traditional appearance.
description: A two-story blue-gray house with a hip roof, wraparound porch, and symmetrical windows, featuring dual front staircases and a covered balcony. The design is traditional and inviting, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual staircases, main entryway, full-length covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped hip roof, horizontal siding, and secondary staircase leading to the upper porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two back doors, small porches, utility bins, and a simpler window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch extension, additional windows, and the continuation of the hip roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double staircase leading to a covered porch with white railings and columns, featuring a prominent main door and decorative trim.
